prompt:
Goal: Create an editorial fashion magazine cover featuring a dreamy close-up portrait of a young woman as a spring muse, surrounded by white flowers, with elegant high-fashion typography and soft cinematic light.

Canvas: Vertical magazine cover, 3:4 aspect ratio, full-bleed portrait photography style, cool pale blue-white palette with deep shadowed background edges.

Subject details: Extreme close-up of a delicate young woman with platinum blonde tousled wispy hair falling across her forehead and partly over one eye, pale luminous skin, large glassy blue-gray eyes looking directly at the viewer, subtle peach-pink glossy lips slightly parted, minimal natural makeup, ethereal and melancholic expression. Her face fills the upper and center-right area of the cover, partly veiled by strands of hair and flower shadows.

Floral styling: Use exactly 5 visible flower groups in the foreground: 1 large soft white flower at bottom left, 1 large pale flower near the lower center, 1 cluster of tiny baby's-breath blossoms across the middle, 1 cluster of small white blossoms near the left cheek, and 1 pale daisy-like bloom near the lower right cheek. Flowers should overlap the lower half of the face and create translucent petal texture.

Lighting and mood: Soft spring sunlight from the upper left, high-key highlights on hair and flowers, gentle dappled flower shadows across the nose, cheek, and lips, muted contrast, airy haze, romantic quiet mood, refined art-magazine aesthetic.

Layout and typography: Place a huge white Didot/Bodoni-style serif masthead reading BLOOM across the very top, oversized and partially cropped by the canvas edges. Keep the masthead behind or visually integrated with the hair, but still readable. Use elegant white serif and small sans-serif text blocks.

Text content: Include exactly 6 discrete text elements: 1) masthead: “BLOOM” at the top; 2) small vertical tagline on upper left: “soft days in bloom — just as you are.”; 3) main feature title on left: Spring Muse; 4) small Chinese subtitle below it: “花与光的私语”; 5) lower-left caption: today, i choose softness. and a little bit of magic.; 6) right-side poetic blurb: “a moment held for you petals, light, and everything I love about this season.” Add a small circular badge near the bottom center-left reading “vol. 07”.

Constraints: Fashion magazine cover only, no barcode, no extra logos, no additional text beyond the specified 6 text elements and the volume badge, no harsh retouching, no cartoon style, no watermark.

Canvas: Vertical magazine cover, 3:4 aspect ratio, full-bleed portrait photography style, cool pale blue-white palette with deep shadowed background edges.

Keep the masthead behind or visually integrated with the hair, but still readable. Use elegant white serif and small sans-serif text blocks.

promptZh:
目标：创作一张时尚杂志封面，以 一位年轻女性 作为春日缪斯的梦幻特写肖像为特色，周围环绕着白色花朵，搭配优雅的高级时尚排版和柔和的电影感光效。

画布：竖版杂志封面，3:4 比例，全出血肖像摄影风格，冷淡的浅蓝白色调，背景边缘带有深色阴影。

主体细节：一位精致年轻女性的极致特写，留着 白金色 凌乱的细碎发丝，发丝垂落在额前并遮住部分眼睛，皮肤白皙透亮，明亮的大眼睛呈蓝灰色，直视镜头，微张的嘴唇带有淡淡的桃粉色光泽，自然裸妆，表情空灵而忧郁。她的脸部占据封面的上方和中右区域，部分被发丝和花影遮掩。

花卉造型：前景需精确使用 5 组可见花卉：左下角 1 朵大型柔和白花，下部中央 1 朵大型浅色花，中间横跨一簇细小的满天星，左脸颊附近一簇小白花，右下脸颊附近 1 朵类似雏菊的浅色花。花朵应覆盖脸部下半部分，并营造出半透明的花瓣质感。

光影与氛围：左上方柔和的春日阳光，发丝和花朵上有高调的亮光，鼻梁、脸颊和嘴唇上有柔和斑驳的花影，对比度柔和，空气感朦胧，浪漫静谧的氛围，精致的艺术杂志美学。

排版与字体：在顶部放置巨大的白色 Didot/Bodoni 风格衬线字体刊头，文字为 BLOOM，超大字号，边缘部分被画布裁剪。刊头应位于发丝后方或与发丝视觉融合，但仍需保持可读性。使用优雅的白色衬线字体和小型无衬线文本块。

文本内容：包含精确 6 个独立的文本元素：1) 刊头：顶部的“BLOOM”；2) 左上角小型竖排标语：“soft days in bloom — just as you are.”；3) 左侧主专题标题：Spring Muse；4) 下方的小型中文副标题：“花与光的私语”；5) 左下角说明文字：today, i choose softness. and a little bit of magic.；6) 右侧诗意短文：“a moment held for you petals, light, and everything I love about this season.” 在底部中左侧添加一个写有“vol. 07”的小型圆形徽章。

约束条件：仅限时尚杂志封面，无条形码，无额外 Logo，除指定的 6 个文本元素和卷号徽章外，不得添加其他文字，无过度修图，无卡通风格，无水印。
